rubric.id: extractor-safe\tThe extractor returns a reasoned skip or a held draft, never a silent write into the live library.
testing-entry\tAny testing discovery becomes a six-field entry in the testing runbook, not only in chat.
boundary-clean\tPage-specific detail lives in the repo and process detail lives in the skill, with no duplication.

notes: Rubric derived from the target's Verification standard.
